candidate_definition_hints.text: The world's smartest system-wide grammar assistant; a better version of the Apple Intelligence Writing Tools. Works on Windows, Linux, & macOS, with the free Gemini API, local LLMs, & more.
> **🍎 Using a Mac? Jump to the macOS (Native Swift Port) section → [macOS](#macos)**
